tasks.title: Create delegation-matrix coverage test
tasks.blockReason: Depends on tk-7dace315d613 (spec creation) — test reads spec
tasks.verification: Created delegation-matrix.test.ts with 12 tests: 9-step coverage (rq-delDefaults01), valid mode enum (rq-delDefaults02), agent existence/boundaries (rq-delDefaults03), specific assignments matching design D2, phantom/primary exclusion, and cross-reference consistency with command contracts (rq-delDefaults06). Handles global agents (explore, general) vs repo-local agents.

tasks.title: Extend phantom-subagent-roster test for primary agents

tasks.title: Consolidate ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md delegation guidance

wisdom.content: When a spec claims to be the single source of truth for a routing matrix, tests should parse the spec’s machine-readable matrix rather than duplicating the expected matrix as a fixture.
